roles.label: Product Manager
roles.about: Product Manager building AI-enabled and B2B products across eCommerce, LegalTech, healthcare workflows, and digital operations.
roles.summary: Product manager with experience across B2B marketplaces, regulated onboarding, healthcare workflow digitization, and AI-enabled product operations. Strongest in roles that need structured discovery, stakeholder alignment, and measurable delivery rather than abstract feature ownership.

roles.label: Product Owner
roles.about: Product Owner focused on backlog definition, stakeholder alignment, and delivery in operations-heavy digital products.
roles.summary: Product owner with hands-on delivery experience from backlog definition to launch, especially in environments where requirements need to stay connected to real operations, compliance, and user pain points.

roles.label: Business Analyst
roles.about: Business Analyst focused on requirement discovery, workflow mapping, and operations-heavy digital products across eCommerce, LegalTech, and healthcare.
roles.summary: Business analyst with a product-delivery mindset, experienced in requirement discovery, workflow mapping, documentation quality, and translating operational pain points into implementable delivery plans.

roles.label: Requirements & Process Management
roles.about: Requirements and process professional focused on translating operational needs into clear documentation, process models, and delivery-ready artifacts.
roles.summary: Requirements and process specialist with hands-on experience in business analysis, workflow mapping, stakeholder alignment, and documentation quality. Strong fit for roles where teams need structure across requirements, process clarity, acceptance criteria, and cross-functional handoff.

roles.label: Process Automation & Digitalization
roles.about: Process and digitalization professional focused on workflow improvement, automation thinking, and AI-assisted operational execution.
roles.summary: Process-improvement and digitalization professional with experience connecting operations, requirements, and practical automation. Strong fit for roles that improve workflows through better process design, coordination, lightweight technical fluency, and AI-assisted execution.

roles.label: PMO & Delivery Support
roles.about: Delivery-support professional focused on coordination, rollout visibility, stakeholder alignment, and execution discipline in digital product teams.
roles.summary: Delivery-support and PMO-oriented professional with experience in rollout coordination, request prioritization, stakeholder communication, and keeping cross-functional teams aligned around practical execution.

roles.label: Quality, Compliance & Process Operations
roles.about: Quality and compliance-aware product operations professional focused on process discipline, documentation quality, testing coordination, and regulated workflows.
roles.summary: Operations and delivery professional with experience in compliance-heavy and documentation-heavy environments. Strong fit for roles that need process discipline, quality thinking, structured change support, and close collaboration with business and technical teams.

roles.label: AI Product Operations
roles.about: AI product and operations builder using automation and context design to improve real workflows, not just demos.
roles.summary: Product and operations professional using AI as a workflow multiplier rather than a branding layer. Strong fit for roles that combine process clarity, experimentation, lightweight technical depth, and practical automation.

roles.label: Implementation, Onboarding & Enablement
roles.about: Implementation and enablement professional focused on rollout support, onboarding clarity, and structured coordination across business, product, and operational teams.
roles.summary: Implementation and enablement professional with experience supporting onboarding, rollout coordination, vendor and stakeholder alignment, and practical execution in process-heavy digital environments. Strong fit for roles that need reliable handoffs, structured follow-through, and adoption support rather than abstract ownership alone.

roles.label: Workflow & Operations Analyst
roles.about: Workflow and operations analyst focused on process clarity, business-technical handoffs, and practical improvements in operational systems.
roles.summary: Workflow and operations analyst with experience connecting business analysis, process mapping, documentation quality, and delivery support in operations-heavy environments. Strong fit for roles that need structure across workflows, handoffs, reporting logic, and day-to-day operational improvement.
